ddls:
CREATE TABLE "area_types" (
  "area_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area type */,
  "area_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the area type */,
  "area_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the area type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_boundary" TEXT /* Geographical boundary of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_area_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_type_id") REFERENCES area_types ("area_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the data entry */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on the date */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases up to the date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths on the date */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths up to the date */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations on the date */,
  "recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., epidemiology, statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-data mapping */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_mapping_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new report, data update) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who subscribed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report subscribed to (optional) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data subscribed to (optional) */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
